title: Chewy Whole30-Friendly Korean Rigatoni Jjigae
description: Floral, chewy, and cozy Korean Gyeongsang dish featuring rigatoni, shio-koji cure, perfect for a Whole30 diet in a copper mug. Serve as a banchan for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Soak the rigatoni in water for 30 minutes before cooking.
Drain and cook the rigatoni in boiling water for 8 minutes.
While the rigatoni cooks, combine gochujang, garlic, and ginger in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the shio-koji cure to the saucepan and stir to combine.
When the rigatoni is cooked, drain and add it to the saucepan with the shio-koji mixture.
Stir to combine and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the pork belly and cook until browned.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the dish to a copper mug and garnish with green onions.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve hot.
